title: BeTaken Boss 2
description:
betaken as a boss?
Betaken is my friend :D
body:
> # what da hail is dis mod?
> this is a **MEME datapack/mod**, it just adds 1 single boss,
> the boss has lot of abilitys he can do, as listed in the discription,
> 

>  # Betaken BOSS 2
> - This datapack/mod adds 1 boss you can fight,
> - its a custom made boss, and a remake of Betaken BOSS 1,
> - you can fight him by summoning him with the given recipe when you load the datapack,
> - by downloading it and trying out the boss, you can have insperation and training, and maybe make your friends challenge you by making a boss for each player, like what i did in this datapack,
> ## the boss has custom attacks which might be overbored
> - letting almost 100 players join and say something (this is a joke ability please dont take it srsly)
> - launching his mars on you (ignore what he says whenever he does the ability, all of the abilitys he says is just for memes)
> - summoning minions to fight with him
> - summoning gurdian to protect him, making him invicible

> - ### Betaken as a boss?
> - Betaken is my friend :D
> - Betaken mad?
> - Betaken ATTACK!!
> - We fight..
